title:
AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN JOSE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE
MUNICIPALITY OF PILI. PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, TO SAGURONG ELEMENTARY
SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4721 / 60 OG No. 47, 7738 (November 23, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3951, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN JOSE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE

MUNICIPALITY OF PILI. PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, TO SAGURONG ELEMENTARY

SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of San Jose Elementary School in the Municipality of Pili, Province of Camarines Sur, is hereby changed to Sagurong Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
